results.question: Which decade of publication (e.g., 1980s) has the highest average rating among decades with at least 10 distinct books that have been rated? Return the decade with the highest average rating.
results.agent_answer: I am unable to retrieve the answer from the database.

args.sql: SELECT (CAST(SUBSTRING(details FROM '\m((?:19|20)\d{2})\M') AS INTEGER) / 10) * 10 AS decade, COUNT(DISTINCT book_id), AVG(rating_number) FROM books_info GROUP BY decade HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) >= 10 ORDER BY AVG(rating_number) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question:
Identify the agent with the fewest transfer counts in the last 4 quarters among those who handled more than 0 cases. Return only the Id of the agent.

## Transfer Count Policy
- Definition: The number of instances a case was reassigned or transferred from one agent to another. Each transfer from agent A to agent B adds to the transfer count for agent A.
- In the queries that specify 'agents managed/queries x cases' -- this filter applies to both the first agent that the case was first assigned to and the agent that the case was transferred to. This means that if an agent has 2 cases that was initially assigned to itself by admin and 1 case transferred from another agent, a filter like 'handled/managed at least 3 cases' would not filter this agent out.
- For cases that have NOT been transferred to an other agent, there will be only ONE 'Owner Assignment', and for those that have been transferred, there will be MORE THAN ONE 'Owner Assignment'.

## Today's date: 2023-04-10

results.question:
In the past four months, which agent had the lowest average handle time for those processing more than one case? Return only the Id of the agent.

## Handle Time Policy
- Definition: The duration taken to close a case. Specifically, it is the time from when a case is opened to when it is closed.
- In the queries that specify 'agents managed/queries x cases' -- this filter applies to both the first agent that the case was first assigned to and the agent that the case was transferred to. This means that if an agent has 2 cases that was initially assigned to itself by admin and 1 case transferred from another agent, a filter like 'handled/managed at least 3 cases' would not filter this agent out.
- When computing handle time, we do not compute handle time for cases that have been transferred to other agents.
- For cases that have NOT been transferred to an other agent, there will be only ONE 'Owner Assignment', and for those that have been transferred, there will be MORE THAN ONE 'Owner Assignment'.

## Today's date: 2023-09-02
results.agent_answer: I am unable to access the support database due to permission issues. I cannot answer the question.

SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY caseid__c HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

results.question:
Who had the quickest average turnaround from opening to closing opportunities among agents in April 2023? Return only the Id of the agent.

## Sales Cycle Policy
- Definition: The sales cycle is measured as the number of days between an opportunity's creation date and the company signed date on the corresponding contract.

## Today's date: 2024-09-12
results.agent_answer: There is no data for opportunities created in April 2023 with a corresponding contract.

args.sql:
SELECT
  Opportunity.OwnerId,
  AVG(JULIANDAY(Contract.CompanySignedDate) - JULIANDAY(Opportunity.CreatedDate)) AS avg_turnaround
FROM Opportunity
JOIN Contract ON Opportunity.ContractID__c = Contract.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', Opportunity.CreatedDate) = '2023-04'
  AND Contract.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Opportunity.OwnerId
ORDER BY
  avg_turnaround ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Opportunity.OwnerId,
  AVG(JULIANDAY(Contract.CompanySignedDate) - JULIANDAY(Opportunity.CreatedDate)) AS avg_turnaround
FROM Opportunity
JOIN Contract ON Opportunity.ContractID__c = Contract.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) = '2023-04'
  AND Contract.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Opportunity.OwnerId
ORDER BY
  avg_turnaround ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Opportunity.OwnerId,
  AVG(JULIAN(Contract.CompanySignedDate) - JULIAN(Opportunity.CreatedDate)) AS avg_turnaround
FROM Opportunity
JOIN Contract ON Opportunity.ContractID__c = Contract.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) = '2023-04'
  AND Contract.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Opportunity.OwnerId
ORDER BY
  avg_turnaround ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Opportunity.OwnerId,
  AVG(JULIAN(TRY_STRPTIME(Contract.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) - JULIAN(TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))) AS avg_turnaround
FROM Opportunity
JOIN Contract ON Opportunity.ContractID__c = Contract.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')) = '2023-04'
  AND Contract.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Opportunity.OwnerId
ORDER BY
  avg_turnaround ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  Opportunity.OwnerId,
  AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(Contract.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(Contract.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(Contract.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Contract.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Contract.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Contract.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) AS avg_turnaround
FROM Opportunity
JOIN Contract ON Opportunity.ContractID__c = Contract.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(Opportunity.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND Contract.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  Opportunity.OwnerId
ORDER BY
  avg_turnaround ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
HAVING COUNT(o.Id) > 0
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.OwnerId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
HAVING COUNT(o.Id) > 0
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
HAVING COUNT(o.Id) > 0
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'

FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'

GROUP BY o.OwnerId
HAVING COUNT(o.Id) > 0
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC NULLS LAST

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
  AND o.OwnerId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  o.OwnerId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) = '2023-04'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
  AND o.ContractID__c IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
HAVING COUNT(o.Id) > 0
ORDER BY AVG(JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(c.CompanySignedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S'))) - JULIAN(COALESCE(TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'), TRY_STRPTIME(o.CreatedDate, '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')))) ASC
LIMIT 1

Identify the agent who achieved the top sales figures for orders made in the past five months. Return only the Id of the agent.

## Sales Amount Policy

- Today's date: 2022-11-25

SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate, OwnerId FROM `Order`
